extraction_instructions:
Visit the website(s) required by the task in the source description.
Collect the data, then fill in this JSON template and upload it as a .json file:

{
  "extracted_answer": "your complete answer",
  "urls_visited": ["url1", "url2"],
  "primary_url": "main site used",
  "data_extracted": { "key": "specific data found" },
  "extraction_notes": "blockers or caveats",
  "extraction_complete": true
}

Leave score_achieved, score_breakdown, reviewer_notes blank — the reviewer fills those.

fields.name: extracted_answer
fields.description: Complete answer to the task — include exact values, names, figures found on the site

fields.name: urls_visited
fields.description: List of all URLs visited to complete the task

fields.name: primary_url
fields.description: The main website or tool used to get the answer

fields.name: data_extracted
fields.description: The specific data points found — prices, names, dates, scores, etc.

fields.name: extraction_notes
fields.description: Any blockers, CAPTCHAs, paywalls, or caveats encountered

fields.name: extraction_complete
fields.description: Set true when the task is done and JSON is complete

fields.name: score_achieved
fields.description: REVIEWER: Points awarded (0 to max shown in source description)

fields.name: score_breakdown
fields.description: REVIEWER: Per-criterion score e.g. Criterion 1: 3/4 — reason
